if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND
tui.user_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%') OR tui.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')

mapper.select:
SELECT row_number() over (ORDER BY tulh.login_date desc) as row_num, tulh.*, tui.user_nm FROM esg.tb_user_login_hi tulh left join esg.tb_user_info tui on tui.user_id = tulh.user_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY tulh.login_date desc LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_user_login_hi tulh left join esg.tb_user_info tui on tui.user_id = tulh.user_id WHERE 1=1

SELECT user_id, login_device, count(login_success_yn = 'N') as login_fail_count FROM esg.tb_user_login_hi tulh WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND login_date = (select MAX(login_date) from esg.tb_user_login_hi where user_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY user_id, login_device
